functions.name: addGitHubModel
functions.description: Adds a GitHub Model resource to the application model using a known `GitHubModelName`.
functions.signature: addGitHubModel(name: string, model: GitHubModelName, organization?: ParameterResource): GitHubModelResource

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the resource. This name will be used as the connection string name when referenced in a dependency.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The known model name from the `GitHubModelName` enumeration.

parameters.name: organization
parameters.description: The organization login associated with the organization to which the request is to be attributed.

functions.name: addGitHubModelById
functions.description: Adds a GitHub Model resource to the application model using a model identifier string.
functions.signature: addGitHubModelById(name: string, modelId: string, organization?: ParameterResource): GitHubModelResource

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the resource. This name will be used as the connection string name when referenced in a dependency.

parameters.name: modelId
parameters.description: The model identifier string, for example `"openai/gpt-4o"`.

parameters.name: organization
parameters.description: The organization login associated with the organization to which the request is to be attributed.

functions.name: withApiKey
functions.description: Configures the API key for the GitHub Model resource from a parameter.

functions.name: withHealthCheck
functions.description: Adds a health check to the GitHub Model resource.
functions.remarks:
This method adds a health check that verifies the GitHub Models endpoint is accessible,
the API key is valid, and the specified model is available. The health check will:
-
-
-
Because health checks are included in the rate limit of the GitHub Models API,
it is recommended to use this health check sparingly, such as when you are having issues understanding the reason
the model is not working as expected. Furthermore, the health check will run a single time per application instance.

capabilities.name: withApiKey
capabilities.description: Configures the API key for the GitHub Model resource from a parameter.

capabilities.name: withHealthCheck
capabilities.description: Adds a health check to the GitHub Model resource.
capabilities.remarks:
This method adds a health check that verifies the GitHub Models endpoint is accessible,
the API key is valid, and the specified model is available. The health check will:
-
-
-
Because health checks are included in the rate limit of the GitHub Models API,
it is recommended to use this health check sparingly, such as when you are having issues understanding the reason
the model is not working as expected. Furthermore, the health check will run a single time per application instance.

enumTypes.name: GitHubModelName
enumTypes.description: Enumerates known GitHub model names for polyglot app host support.

memberDocs.name: AI21Jamba15Large
memberDocs.description: A 398B parameters (94B active) multilingual model, offering a 256K long context window, function calling, structured output, and grounded generation.

memberDocs.name: CohereCommandA
memberDocs.description: Command A is a highly efficient generative model that excels at agentic and multilingual use cases.

memberDocs.name: CohereCommandR082024
memberDocs.description: Command R is a scalable generative model targeting RAG and Tool Use to enable production-scale AI for enterprise.

memberDocs.name: CohereCommandRPlus082024
memberDocs.description: Command R+ is a state-of-the-art RAG-optimized model designed to tackle enterprise-grade workloads.

memberDocs.name: DeepSeekR1
memberDocs.description: DeepSeek-R1 excels at reasoning tasks using a step-by-step training process, such as language, scientific reasoning, and coding tasks.

memberDocs.name: DeepSeekR10528
memberDocs.description: The DeepSeek R1 0528 model has improved reasoning capabilities, this version also offers a reduced hallucination rate, enhanced support for function calling, and better experience for vibe coding.

memberDocs.name: DeepSeekV30324
memberDocs.description: DeepSeek-V3-0324 demonstrates notable improvements over its predecessor, DeepSeek-V3, in several key aspects, including enhanced reasoning, improved function calling, and superior code generation capabilities.

memberDocs.name: Llama4Maverick17B128EInstructFP8
memberDocs.description: Llama 4 Maverick 17B 128E Instruct FP8 is great at precise image understanding and creative writing, offering high quality at a lower price compared to Llama 3.3 70B

memberDocs.name: Llama4Scout17B16EInstruct
memberDocs.description: Llama 4 Scout 17B 16E Instruct is great at multi-document summarization, parsing extensive user activity for personalized tasks, and reasoning over vast codebases.

memberDocs.name: Llama3211BVisionInstruct
memberDocs.description: Excels in image reasoning capabilities on high-res images for visual understanding apps.

memberDocs.name: Llama3290BVisionInstruct
memberDocs.description: Advanced image reasoning capabilities for visual understanding agentic apps.

memberDocs.name: Llama3370BInstruct
memberDocs.description: Llama 3.3 70B Instruct offers enhanced reasoning, math, and instruction following with performance comparable to Llama 3.1 405B.

memberDocs.name: MetaLlama31405BInstruct
memberDocs.description: The Llama 3.1 instruction tuned text only models are optimized for multilingual dialogue use cases and outperform many of the available open source and closed chat models on common industry benchmarks.

memberDocs.name: MetaLlama318BInstruct
memberDocs.description: The Llama 3.1 instruction tuned text only models are optimized for multilingual dialogue use cases and outperform many of the available open source and closed chat models on common industry benchmarks.

memberDocs.name: MaiDSR1
memberDocs.description: MAI-DS-R1 is a DeepSeek-R1 reasoning model that has been post-trained by the Microsoft AI team to fill in information gaps in the previous version of the model and improve its harm protections while maintaining R1 reasoning capabilities.

memberDocs.name: Phi4
memberDocs.description: Phi-4 14B, a highly capable model for low latency scenarios.

memberDocs.name: Phi4MiniInstruct
memberDocs.description: 3.8B parameters Small Language Model outperforming larger models in reasoning, math, coding, and function-calling

memberDocs.name: Phi4MiniReasoning
memberDocs.description: Lightweight math reasoning model optimized for multi-step problem solving

memberDocs.name: Phi4MultimodalInstruct
memberDocs.description: First small multimodal model to have 3 modality inputs (text, audio, image), excelling in quality and efficiency

memberDocs.name: Phi4Reasoning
memberDocs.description: State-of-the-art open-weight reasoning model.

memberDocs.name: Codestral2501
memberDocs.description: Codestral 25.01 by Mistral AI is designed for code generation, supporting 80+ programming languages, and optimized for tasks like code completion and fill-in-the-middle

memberDocs.name: Ministral3B
memberDocs.description: Ministral 3B is a state-of-the-art Small Language Model (SLM) optimized for edge computing and on-device applications. As it is designed for low-latency and compute-efficient inference, it it also the perfect model for standard GenAI applications that have

memberDocs.name: MistralMedium32505
memberDocs.description: Mistral Medium 3 is an advanced Large Language Model (LLM) with state-of-the-art reasoning, knowledge, coding and vision capabilities.

memberDocs.name: MistralSmall31
memberDocs.description: Enhanced Mistral Small 3 with multimodal capabilities and a 128k context length.

memberDocs.name: OpenAIGpt41
memberDocs.description: gpt-4.1 outperforms gpt-4o across the board, with major gains in coding, instruction following, and long-context understanding

memberDocs.name: OpenAIGpt41Mini
memberDocs.description: gpt-4.1-mini outperform gpt-4o-mini across the board, with major gains in coding, instruction following, and long-context handling

memberDocs.name: OpenAIGpt41Nano
memberDocs.description: gpt-4.1-nano provides gains in coding, instruction following, and long-context handling along with lower latency and cost

memberDocs.name: OpenAIGpt4o
memberDocs.description: OpenAI's most advanced multimodal model in the gpt-4o family. Can handle both text and image inputs.

memberDocs.name: OpenAIGpt4oMini
memberDocs.description: An affordable, efficient AI solution for diverse text and image tasks.

memberDocs.name: OpenAIGpt5
memberDocs.description: gpt-5 is designed for logic-heavy and multi-step tasks.

memberDocs.name: OpenAIGpt5ChatPreview
memberDocs.description: gpt-5-chat (preview) is an advanced, natural, multimodal, and context-aware conversations for enterprise applications.

memberDocs.name: OpenAIGpt5Mini
memberDocs.description: gpt-5-mini is a lightweight version for cost-sensitive applications.

memberDocs.name: OpenAIGpt5Nano
memberDocs.description: gpt-5-nano is optimized for speed, ideal for applications requiring low latency.

memberDocs.name: OpenAIO1
memberDocs.description: Focused on advanced reasoning and solving complex problems, including math and science tasks. Ideal for applications that require deep contextual understanding and agentic workflows.

memberDocs.name: OpenAIO1Mini
memberDocs.description: Smaller, faster, and 80% cheaper than o1-preview, performs well at code generation and small context operations.

memberDocs.name: OpenAIO1Preview
memberDocs.description: Focused on advanced reasoning and solving complex problems, including math and science tasks. Ideal for applications that require deep contextual understanding and agentic workflows.

memberDocs.name: OpenAIO3
memberDocs.description: o3 includes significant improvements on quality and safety while supporting the existing features of o1 and delivering comparable or better performance.

memberDocs.name: OpenAIO3Mini
memberDocs.description: o3-mini includes the o1 features with significant cost-efficiencies for scenarios requiring high performance.

memberDocs.name: OpenAIO4Mini
memberDocs.description: o4-mini includes significant improvements on quality and safety while supporting the existing features of o3-mini and delivering comparable or better performance.

memberDocs.name: OpenAITextEmbedding3Large
memberDocs.description: Text-embedding-3 series models are the latest and most capable embedding model from OpenAI.

memberDocs.name: OpenAITextEmbedding3Small
memberDocs.description: Text-embedding-3 series models are the latest and most capable embedding model from OpenAI.

memberDocs.name: Grok3
memberDocs.description: Grok 3 is xAI's debut model, pretrained by Colossus at supermassive scale to excel in specialized domains like finance, healthcare, and the law.

memberDocs.name: Grok3Mini
memberDocs.description: Grok 3 Mini is a lightweight model that thinks before responding. Trained on mathematic and scientific problems, it is great for logic-based tasks.
